block_00: Take a look at the top news of the week
block_03: Netflix has enjoyed quite a few Wall Street upgrades recently. Analysts raised their price targets on the stock, citing the company's move into advertising. Netflix is looking to charge advertisers roughly $65 for reaching 1,000 viewers. That charge is significantly higher than most other streaming competitors.
block_07: Social-media firm saw shares rise Tuesday as it contested with Elon Musk's legal team relating to discovery disputes ahead of a blockbuster trial. The share price has increased by 3% in one week.
block_10: The company is partnering with Batelle and GTI Energy plus West Virginia and Allegheny Science & Technology on a hydrogen energy hub. Despite this, the share has fallen by 13% this week
